title: CF_DocCentralV3_GenerateRegistryNumber — Power Apps V2 Trigger Input Schema
description: Input parameters for the CF_DocCentralV3_GenerateRegistryNumber child flow. Called by CF_DocCentralV3_CreateDocument to atomically increment the registry counter and return the formatted delovodni broj.

initiatorEmail.description: Email address of the user who initiated the document creation. Written to AuditLog for the GenerateRegistryNumber event. Must be non-empty.

correlationId.description: Correlation ID to link this log entry to the parent flow run (CF_DocCentralV3_CreateDocument). If empty or omitted, the flow generates a new GUID. Pass the parent flow's correlationId for end-to-end log tracing.

callerNotes.howToCall: Use the 'Run a Child Flow' action in the parent flow. Select CF_DocCentralV3_GenerateRegistryNumber as the child flow.
callerNotes.passingCorrelationId: Always pass the parent flow's varCorrelationId so that all audit log entries for the same document creation share the same correlationId.
callerNotes.onFailure: If this flow returns success=false, CF_DocCentralV3_CreateDocument must stop and return its own failure response. Do not create the document item in Svi predmeti without a valid delovodni broj.
